SPORIFISHING ASSOCIATION OF CALIFORNIA
2917 CANON STREET
SAN DIEGO, CALTFORNIA 92106

November 7, l99q
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J street
Sacramento, cA 95814
Dear sir:
The sportfishing Association of California (SAC) is
."qu.iting a foinal written opinion on whether we should be
legally required to File Form 410 and Form 450. After
telephone discussions with staff of the Political 
Reform
Divi;ion of the Secretary of states' Office, it became clear
that there was confusion regarding my organization's need to
file the Statement of organization, Form 416.
sAc was formed in L972 to further the interests of the
Southern California Sportfishing Industry. The operating
budget comes from dues paid by the members. The last several
yeais the total operating budget has been approx. $L56,096'go
lnnualty. 
The members' dues are in no way earmarked for any
dedicated purpose, such as political 
donations, but are made
available ior such purposes as the Board of Directors choose,
including a sma1l percentage for campaign contributions. 
SAC
has one iull time enployee, myself, and a part-time clerical.
I am Presialent and Treasurer, and spend ny time rnainly
working with state, federal and foreign adninistrators on
issues of interest or concern to the Sportfishing Fleet.
since r became president and treasurer in March of 1989, sAc
has never donated more than approx. 97,969.00 in any calendar
year. In addition, with the exception of the Pete Wilson
campaign to which SAc contributed 92,509.b0 in calendar year
l99O after the court decision invalidated Iimits on
contributions, SAC has not donated in excess of $1,0A0.06 to
any candidate.
In light of the above information, I sincerely guestion
whether the Sportfishing Association of California qualifies
as a 'Recipient Committeer for the purposes of Eorm 410.
It appears to me that our filing of Form 635 regularly keeps
the state advised as to our political 
donations.
ROBERT C, FLErcHER
W A. NOTT


For purposes of background, I did file a form 410 recently
and then was notified that I had incurred a liability 
foi-

days of qualification.

question was how did I know
vrhen SAC had qualified when the m6mbers' annual dues were in
n9 Iuy designated? I had originatly filed the Forn 410 on
advice of the political 
neform nivi3ion staff. 
when I
received my identification 
number (9g2964) and the noiice of
liability, 
I discussed aI1 this with staff person Sarfaii --
Smith, who suggested that I request the formal opinion.
Thank you for your time and consideration of our request, and
I can be reached at (6I9) 226-6455 during normal Uujiness
hours most week days if you require any additional
i nf ormat i on.
Sincerely,
